topics.name: Number and Numeration (JSS1 - JSS3)
topics.description: Whole numbers, place value, prime numbers, LCM, HCF, fractions, decimals, percentages, and binary numbers.

subtopics.name: Whole Numbers, Factors, and Multiples
objectives: Identify place values of whole numbers up to billions
Find Prime Factors, Highest Common Factor (HCF), and Least Common Multiple (LCM)
Express numbers in standard form and scientific notation

subtopics.name: Fractions, Decimals, and Percentages
objectives: Convert between proper/improper fractions, mixed numbers, decimals, and percentages
Perform addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division of fractions and decimals
Solve percentage profit, loss, discount, and simple interest problems

subtopics.name: Binary Numbers (Base 2)
objectives: Convert numbers from base 10 to base 2 and vice versa
Perform addition and subtraction of binary numbers

topics.name: Basic Algebra (JSS1 - JSS3)
topics.description: Algebraic simplification, linear equations, substitution, expansion, factorisation, and variation.

subtopics.name: Algebraic Expressions and Substitution
objectives: Translate word problems into algebraic expressions
Evaluate algebraic expressions by substitution
Group like terms and simplify algebraic expressions

subtopics.name: Linear Equations and Inequalities
objectives: Solve linear equations in one variable
Solve simultaneous linear equations using substitution and elimination
Represent linear inequalities on a number line

subtopics.name: Factorisation and Quadratic Expressions
objectives: Factorise algebraic expressions by taking out common factors
Expand binomial expressions (x + a)(x + b)
Solve simple quadratic equations of the form x² + bx + c = 0

topics.name: Geometry and Mensuration (JSS1 - JSS3)
topics.description: Plane shapes, angles, triangles, perimeter, area, 3D solids, volume, and scale drawing.

subtopics.name: Angles and Plane Shapes
objectives: Identify acute, right, obtuse, reflex, complementary, and supplementary angles
Calculate angles on a straight line, parallel lines, and in triangles/quadrilaterals
Apply Pythagoras' theorem to right-angled triangles

subtopics.name: Perimeter and Area of 2D Shapes
objectives: Calculate perimeters and areas of rectangles, squares, triangles, parallelograms, and trapeziums
Calculate circumference and area of circles and sectors

subtopics.name: Surface Area and Volume of 3D Solids
objectives: Identify properties of cubes, cuboids, cylinders, triangular prisms, and cones
Calculate surface area and volume of cubes, cuboids, and cylinders

topics.name: Statistics and Probability (JSS1 - JSS3)
topics.description: Data collection, frequency tables, bar charts, pie charts, mean, median, mode, and simple probability.

subtopics.name: Data Collection and Representation
objectives: Organize raw data into tally marks and frequency distribution tables
Construct and interpret bar charts, pictograms, and pie charts

subtopics.name: Measures of Central Tendency
objectives: Calculate mean, median, and mode for ungrouped discrete data
Identify modal class and range of data sets

subtopics.name: Simple Probability
objectives: Determine experimental and theoretical probability of single events (coin toss, die roll)
Express probability as fractions, decimals, and percentages
